_comment: Knockback focus (#688): an attack-order subtype that trades damage for a much bigger, more probable push-back (UnitCombat.KNOCKBACK_FOCUS_DAMAGE_MULT / SoldierCombat.KNOCKBACK_FOCUS_IMPULSE_MULT). Standard 5v5 spawn (no custom scenario override): the player Infantry (uid 1) is selected, given a right-click attack-move order onto its opposite-number enemy Infantry (uid 6), THEN switched to Knockback focus (Ctrl+Equal) -- a fresh move/attack order resets order_mode to NORMAL (Battle._apply_order_cmd's `if not append: u.order_mode = mode`), so the stance has to be applied via a later stance-only order, same as the wedge-charge demo's pattern. Driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd. World coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
